content:
Hi there!
I am Zhou Tong 👋

I’m from China. I recently graduated from Beijing University of Technology (BJUT) with a major in Electronic Information Engineering.

Throughout my studies at BJUT, I have been constantly learning and improving my knowledge in various fields, such as python, pytorch, and natural language processing. I am a self-motivated learner and have been teaching myself these skills in my free time.

I am now looking to further my education and am planning to apply for computer science programs starting in 2023 fall. I am excited to continue learning and growing in this field, and am determined to become a successful computer scientist.

In my free time, I enjoy reading 📖, watching movies 🎥, and traveling 🌏. I am also a big fan of recreational activities such as archery and camping.

Thank you for visiting my personal website and taking the time to learn more about me. I look forward to sharing my knowledge and experiences with you.
